principles.oneListDefault: Most users have one list. UI is optimized for the single-list case.
principles.noOwnership: All members are equal. Anyone can add/check/delete items, rename, invite, leave.
principles.linkSharing: Share by link (copy or native OS share sheet). No email/username entry.
principles.temporaryLists: Secondary lists are for events (ski trip, party). Not a permanent feature.
principles.alwaysHaveAList: User can never be listless. Leaving/deleting last list auto-creates a fresh empty one.

delete.label: Delete list
delete.visibleWhen: list is NOT shared AND user has 2+ lists

avatarRow.displayRule: Only shown when list has 2+ members

listSwitcher.trigger: tap list name pill (only when chevron visible)
listSwitcher.displayRule: Only shown when user has 2+ lists
listSwitcher.behavior: App remembers last-used list. On open, shows last-used list. No 'main' or 'default' concept.

shareList.trigger: context menu → 'Share list' OR tap + on avatar row
steps: Show members list below with remove (✕) per member

shareSheet.title: Share "{listName}"
shareSheet.description: Anyone with the link can view and edit this list.

removeMember.trigger: Tap ✕ on member in share sheet

confirmation.message: Remove {memberName} from this list? They'll lose access to all items.

afterConfirm: Removed member: on next app focus/sync, redirected to fresh empty 'Einkaufsliste'
Removed member sees toast: 'You were removed from {listName}'

steps: Show accept screen: inviter name, list name, item count
After login, redirect back to accept screen

joinList.trigger: User B taps 'Join list' on accept screen

emptyList.condition: User B's current list has 0 items
emptyList.behavior: Shared list replaces User B's empty list. No merge dialog. Result: 1 list.
emptyList.afterJoin: Navigate to shared list. Avatar row shows both members.

hasItems.condition: User B's current list has 1+ items

mergePrompt.message: You have {N} items on your current list. What do you want to do?

options.label: Merge & join
options.behavior: User B's unchecked items added to shared list. Checked items are NOT transferred. User B's old solo list deleted. Result: 1 list.

options.label: Keep mine separate
options.behavior: Both lists kept. Shared list becomes active. Chevron appears. Result: 2 lists.

notNow.trigger: User B taps 'Not now' on accept screen
notNow.behavior: Returns to own list. Nothing changes. Link remains valid for later.

createList.trigger: context menu → 'Create new list' OR list switcher → '+ New list'

edgeCases.duplicateName: Allowed. Names are not unique identifiers.

afterRename: Name updates immediately for all members
Existing share links still work (show new name on accept screen)

edgeCases.simultaneousRename: Last write wins. No conflict resolution.

confirmation.message: Leave '{listName}'? You'll lose access to all shared items.

hasOtherLists.behavior: Removed from shared list. Switches to most recently used remaining list. Chevron disappears if only 1 list remains.

onlyList.behavior: Removed from shared list. Fresh empty 'Einkaufsliste' auto-created. User lands on empty list. No chevron.

lastPersonLeaves.behavior: User removed (per above). List has 0 members → list deleted from database. All items deleted. Share links become invalid.

leaveList.otherMembersSee: Avatar disappears on next sync. No notification.

deleteList.trigger: context menu → 'Delete list' (only non-shared, only when 2+ lists)

confirmation.message: Delete '{listName}'? {N} items will be permanently removed.

afterDelete: Switches to most recently used remaining list
Chevron disappears if only 1 list remains

edgeCases.allOtherListsDeletedConcurrently: If this was somehow the last list, auto-create fresh 'Einkaufsliste'.

linkMechanics.revocable: Yes — regenerating a new link invalidates the old one
linkMechanics.reusable: Yes — multiple people can join via same link
linkMechanics.offlineShare: Copy link works if token already generated. Share sheet may fail if token needs server call — show error toast.

syncBehavior.note: Sync mechanism TBD. Currently one-time fetch. These define what members see, not how.

events.itemAdded: Appears in other members' list on next sync
events.listRenamed: Name updates in header for all members
events.memberRemoved: Avatar disappears. Removed member sees toast on next focus.
events.listCleared: All items removed for all members
